requirement_topic.en: ENRE / Distributor Grid Connection and Load Review
requirement_topic.zh: ENRE / 配电商并网及负荷审查
requirement_topic.zht: ENRE / 配電商併網及負荷審查

summary.en: ENRE supervises federal-jurisdiction electricity service providers under Argentina's electricity framework and concession contracts. EV charger projects in ENRE-regulated distribution areas, especially higher-power AC or DC installations, may require distributor review for service capacity, metering, protection, power quality, civil works, and connection changes before energization. Resolucion ENRE 65/2024 introduced a simplified authorization route for Minor Expansion works (minor scope, short execution time, limited environmental impact); confirm whether a charger installation qualifies as a Minor Expansion or requires the full Certificate of Public Convenience and Necessity process.
summary.zh: ENRE依据阿根廷电力框架和特许经营合同监管联邦管辖范围内的电力服务企业。在ENRE监管配电区域内，电动汽车充电项目，特别是较大功率交流或直流设施，投运前可能需要配电商审查供电容量、计量、保护、电能质量、土建工程及接入变更。Resolucion ENRE 65/2024 为小型扩建工程（范围小、工期短、环境影响有限）引入了简化授权路径；应确认充电桩安装是否符合小型扩建资格，或是否须完成完整的公共便利和必要性证书程序。
summary.zht: ENRE依據阿根廷電力框架和特許經營合約監管聯邦管轄範圍內的電力服務企業。在ENRE監管配電區域內，電動汽車充電項目，特別是較大功率交流或直流設施，投運前可能需要配電商審查供電容量、計量、保護、電能質量、土建工程及接入變更。Resolucion ENRE 65/2024 為小型擴建工程（範圍小、工期短、環境影響有限）引入了簡化授權路徑；應確認充電樁安裝是否符合小型擴建資格，或是否須完成完整的公共便利和必要性證書程序。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion ENRE 65/2024 (simplifies authorization procedure for minor grid-expansion works, defines Minor Expansion category, and creates informational registries for transport expansions and access — check whether a charger installation qualifies as Minor Expansion or requires full Certificate of Public Convenience and Necessity)

summary.en: China charger documentation may include GB/T charger tests, factory FAT records, and State Grid or local utility design assumptions. Those documents do not replace the Argentine distributor's site-specific load and connection approval for the actual point of supply.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩文件可能包括GB/T充电桩测试、工厂FAT记录以及国家电网或地方电网设计假设。这些文件不能替代阿根廷配电商针对实际供电点的现场负荷和接入批准。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁文件可能包括GB/T充電樁測試、工廠FAT記錄以及國家電網或地方電網設計假設。這些文件不能替代阿根廷配電商針對實際供電點的現場負荷和接入批准。

standards_or_laws: Chinese utility project connection documents where applicable

gap.en: Prepare Argentina site load calculations, single-line diagrams, protection settings, earthing design, harmonic or power-quality evidence where relevant, metering details, and commissioning procedures for the distributor or engineer of record. Separate product compliance evidence from grid-connection approval.
gap.zh: 应为配电商或责任工程师准备阿根廷现场负荷计算、单线图、保护定值、接地设计、适用时的谐波或电能质量证据、计量细节和调试程序。应区分产品合规证据与并网接入批准。
gap.zht: 應為配電商或責任工程師準備阿根廷現場負荷計算、單線圖、保護定值、接地設計、適用時的諧波或電能質量證據、計量細節和調試程序。應區分產品合規證據與併網接入批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger installation requires a new supply, increased contracted capacity, service modification, distributor approval, or ENRE-regulated connection condition
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-connection evidence is project-specific and does not approve an Argentine point of supply

source.publisher: Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad (ENRE), Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A GB/T charger report does not energize an Argentine site. Treat ENRE or distributor connection review as a separate project approval whenever the supply capacity or service connection is affected.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T充电桩报告本身不能使阿根廷现场投运。只要供电容量或服务接入受到影响，应将ENRE或配电商接入审查作为独立项目批准处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T充電樁報告本身不能使阿根廷現場投運。只要供電容量或服務接入受到影響，應將ENRE或配電商接入審查作為獨立項目批准處理。
